name: Thumbprint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the confectioners sugar and measure.
2. Beat the sugar, butter, salt, and vanilla together until fluffy.
3. Sift the flour onto a square of waxed paper or into a bowl and then measure.
4. Stir the sifted flour and pecans into the sugar mixture.
5. Mix well.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for at least an hour so the dough will shape easily.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F when ready to bake.
8. Shape the chilled dough into small balls.
9. Place the balls about 3 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Press a small hole in the center of each ball with your thumb tip.
11. Bake on the rack in the centre of the oven for about 15 minutes, or until lightly browned and set.
12. Remove from the oven and spread cookies on a rack to cool.
